parameter-group.name: connection
parameter-group.label: Connection settings
parameter-group.description: General connection settings for the Becker CentralControl.

parameter-group.name: timeouts
parameter-group.label: Timeout and queue settings
parameter-group.description: Advanced timeout and queue settings for the Becker CentralControl.

parameter.name: host
parameter.label: Host
parameter.description: Network address or host name of the Becker CentralControl.

parameter.name: port
parameter.label: Port
parameter.description: Network port of the Becker CentralControl.

parameter.name: connectionDelay
parameter.label: Connection delay
parameter.description: Time between binding initialization and first connection attempt (seconds, 0-120)

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh interval
parameter.description: Time between requests to refresh state from Becker CentralControl (seconds, 1-3600)

parameter.name: idleTimeout
parameter.label: Idle timeout
parameter.description: Time of inactivity before connection is closed (seconds, 1-3600)

parameter.name: queueTimeout
parameter.label: Queue timeout
parameter.description: Time to wait for a response from Becker CentralControl (seconds, 1-60)

parameter.name: queueTimeoutInterval
parameter.label: Queue timeout interval
parameter.description: Time between checks for missing responses from Becker CentralControl (milliseconds, 1-1000)

parameter.name: id
parameter.label: ID
parameter.description: The number uniquely identifying this device.
